records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. para` beside + <?/, dim. of <?/ foot.]

defs: One of the lateral appendages of an annelid; -- called also foot tubercle.
notes: ☞ They may serve for locomotion, respiration, and sensation, and often contain spines or setæ. When well developed, a dorsal part, or notopodium, and a ventral part, or neuropodium, are distinguished.
